meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching for AI Students: No Code to Pro Checklist
content.seo_description: Overcome a lack of coding experience with this student-focused guide. Master freelance pitching for AI apps using Antigravity and Claude Code tools.
content.answer_block: You don't need a CS degree to build production-grade AI tools; you need a workflow. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic, you can turn your lack of experience into a competitive advantage by delivering high-value, AI-driven solutions to clients faster than traditional developers.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a terrifying abyss. You have the ambition to launch, but the gap between 'idea' and 'shippable product' feels like a chasm when you haven't mastered syntax. Most students stay stuck in tutorial hell, paralyzed by the fear that their lack of coding experience makes them unemployable in the new AI economy.

But the rules have changed. We are entering an era where architectural thinking outweighs raw typing speed. With the right orchestration of AI-native tools, you aren't just a student—you are a high-leverage builder capable of deploying complex systems that solve real business problems. It's time to stop learning to code and start building to learn.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-SaaS
steps.description: Identify a specific pain point for a local business. Use Antigravity to generate a technical requirements document (TRD) that translates business needs into an actionable feature set.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior SaaS architect. Create a technical requirements document for a micro-SaaS that automates lead qualification for real estate agents using OpenAI's API. Focus on MVP features only.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'create a project folder named lead-gen-bot and generate a README.md based on the provided TRD'

steps.title: Scaffold the Backend Architecture
steps.description: Don't build from scratch. Use Antigravity to scaffold a secure, scalable backend structure that handles authentication and API routing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a FastAPI boilerplate for a secure backend. Include JWT authentication, a database schema for user leads, and a structured folder layout for modular development.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'scaffold the FastAPI project files and install necessary dependencies using pip'

steps.title: Implement AI Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Inject the intelligence. Use Claude Code to write the core logic that interacts with external AI models, ensuring robust error handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust python service that takes a user query, processes it through a prompt-engineered chain, and returns a structured JSON response.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'create service/ai_processor.py and implement a function to interact with the OpenAI API'

steps.title: Build the Client-Facing Pitch Deck
steps.description: Your code is worthless if you can't sell it. Use AI to draft a technical pitch that highlights the ROI of your tool to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 5-slide pitch deck script for a non-technical business owner. Focus on how this AI tool reduces manual labor by 15 hours per week.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'generate pitch_deck.md with clear sections: Problem, Solution, ROI, Timeline, and Call to Action'

steps.title: Deployment and Client Handoff
steps.description: Finalize the environment and prepare for production. Use Claude Code to check for security vulnerabilities and verify deployment readiness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a security auditor. Review the current project structure for common vulnerabilities and suggest a deployment strategy for a student budget.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'run security audit and generate a deployment.sh script for Vercel or Railway'

pro_tips: Always pitch the outcome, never the technology stack; clients care about saved hours, not your choice of FastAPI.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your AI prompts to ensure consistent output quality before demoing.
Maintain a 'build log' in your repo to show clients the iterative process, which builds massive trust.
Limit your MVP scope to one singular, high-impact feature—overbuilding is the primary reason student projects fail.
Leverage free-tier cloud credits (Vercel/Railway) to keep your overhead at zero while you scale to your first paying client.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, record a 60-second screen capture of the product in action and use it as your primary outreach asset for your next cold pitch.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools to bypass traditional entry barriers and start shipping professional software. Stop waiting for permission to build. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
